name: Ben Carson
subject: This is who fuels our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151594:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r)
---

Peter,

[ I wanted to share a very short video](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151594:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r) introducing you to our most recent contest winner, Madeline Hundy, and her husband Nigel. She entered by making her first-time donation of $5.

After being selected, my campaign team flew them up to New Hampshire from Florida so they could join me and Candy as our special guests for our 40th Wedding Anniversary Celebration.
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151594:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r)
---

You see, it is people like Madeline helping out with small donations of $5 that are fueling our campaign. It may not seem like much but it all adds up -- and people are beginning to notice.

For example, a new story by _US News & World Report_ notes that I am "relying on regular folks to finance [my] first attempt at political office...That's a rarity in today's big-money environment, and a potential source of growth for Carson."

I am thrilled that my message of re-establishing a government of, by and for the people is resonating. And it's even more incredible to know that people like you, Madeline and others all across our country are willing to invest your hard earned money in this campaign.

[**Please take one minute to watch our new video, and make a donation of any amount so we can take this campaign to heal, inspire and revive America to the next level.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151594:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151595:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29151596:27979942383:m:1:876315805:1B1ACA247006A878A7552C6F8E7FC471:r)
---
|
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A bad Iran deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007564:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r)
---
Peter, By now, you've probably heard about President Obama's latest "deal" with Iran. I have said from the beginning of this process that I would not support a deal with Iran that allows the mullahs to retain the ability to develop nuclear weapons, threaten Israel, and continue their regional expansionism and support for terrorism. Based on what we know thus far, I believe that this deal undermines our national security. That's why I'm leading the charge in Washington to stop this deal. [_**Click here to watch my FOX News interview on this one-sided deal, read about the steps we are taking, and let me know if you agree with me that this is a bad deal for America.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007565:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007565:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r) I also wrote Secretary of State John Kerry to express my disappointment that the negotiations did not secure the unconditional release of Americans currently being held captive by Iran. It's clear, as details continue to emerge, that this is more about President Obama's legacy and presidential library, than about protecting the security of the United States and our ally, Israel. Make sure you're connected with me on [Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007566:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r) and [Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007567:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r) to keep up to date with the very latest. Sincerely, Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43007568:18155054555:m:1:1349778030:C36E7F68E99F0C5D028031F7998F0353:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

I have said from the beginning of this process that I would not support a deal with Iran that allows the mullahs to retain the ability to develop nuclear weapons, threaten Israel, and continue their regional expansionism and support for terrorism. Based on what we know thus far, I believe that this deal undermines our national security. That's why I'm leading the charge in Washington to stop this deal. I also wrote Secretary of State John Kerry to express my disappointment that the negotiations did not secure the unconditional release of Americans currently being held captive by Iran. It's clear, as details continue to emerge, that this is more about President Obama's legacy and presidential library, than about protecting the security of the United States and our ally, Israel. Make sure you're connected with me on and to keep up to date with the very latest. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 50 years of Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The end of this month marks the 50th anniversary of Medicare. Friend -- The end of this month marks the 50th anniversary of Medicare. 50 years of providing seniors with essential medical coverage. Despite its essential benefits, Republicans in Congress continue to threaten to fundamentally change Medicare as we know it -- a disastrous proposal for Florida's seniors. It's time for Congress to focus on improving Medicare and to stop the attacks. Florida's seniors earned their benefits. Fundamentally changing Medicare or worse -- privatizing it -- would jeopardize those benefits. We can't let that happen. I'm joining with Democrats across the country, including several of my colleagues in Congress and over 10 progressive groups and state parties, to call on Republicans to stop attacking Medicare. Will you join us? [**Add your name: Call on Republicans to stop the attacks on Medicare!**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201d/738133e4/393f4e19/7f91f611/711555165/VEsH/ "http://signforgood.com/medicare/?code=murphy") Thank you for taking a stand for Florida's seniors. Patrick Murphy | **[SIGN ON »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201d/738133e4/393f4e19/7f91f611/711555165/VEsE/ "http://signforgood.com/medicare/?code=murphy")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201d/738133e4/393f4e19/7f91f612/711555165/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Chip Englander
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 7/18
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
| | |
---
| | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29156088:27983541857:m:1:879035888:FAD3D016C9C551F1D84B54CD4C444725:r)
---
| | �
---
**Saturday, July 18, 2015**

Senator Paul has been leading the way on a number of major issues, recently introducing legislation to end sanctuary cities and defund Planned Parenthood. He also traveled to Houston, Texas on Friday, where he was greeted by a packed room with hundreds of supporters.

Senator Paul dominated the Coalition of New Hampshire Taxpayers Straw Poll in Hillsboro with almost 40% of the vote. The Straw Poll has long been viewed as a barometer of where the Granite State's grassroots voters are leaning. This is just the latest poll that shows Senator Paul has what it takes to win the nomination and take on Hillary Clinton. We look forward to building on this momentum in the coming weeks. Stay tuned for the next edition of the Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
�
�
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Senator Rand Paul to Lead Fight Against Planned Parenthood
Next week, Sen. Paul will seek to strip Planned Parenthood of its taxpayer funding, which totaled roughly $528.4 million dollars in 2013 - 2014. Sen. Paul will use all legislative vehicles at his disposal in order to ensure there is immediate action on this proposal.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29156089:27983541857:m:1:879035888:FAD3D016C9C551F1D84B54CD4C444725:r)
---
|
### Congresswoman Cynthia Lummis Named Western States Co-Chairman of Rand Paul for President
"I am proud to have the support of Congresswoman Lummis in my run for the presidency. She is a staunch supporter of conservative values, and since taking office she has fought to restore fiscal sanity, regulatory restraint and understands the importance of defending our Bill of Rights," Sen. Rand Paul said.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29156090:27983541857:m:1:879035888:FAD3D016C9C551F1D84B54CD4C444725:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul Seeks to Unleash the American Dream in Detroit
"It's time for new models to help more Americans live the American Dream - models like my 'Fair and Flat Tax' plan, and Economic Freedom Zones. New models that let working Americans keep more of their hard-earned money," Sen. Rand Paul said.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29156091:27983541857:m:1:879035888:FAD3D016C9C551F1D84B54CD4C444725:r)
---
�
